creator: kalten@gmx.at
text:
Greetings!

Iff one sets CAPIDOCS=on the following errors occur:

> ===>  Building package for ruby-2.4.1,1
> pkg-static: duplicate file listing: /usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/.timestamp, ignoring
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/d4/dc4/constdefs_8h.html:No such file or directory
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/d4/dc4/constdefs_8h_source.html:No such file or directory
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/d8/dac/openssl_2conftest_8c.html:No such file or directory
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/d8/dac/openssl_2conftest_8c_source.html:No such file or directory
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/da/ddc/constdefs_8h__dep__incl.map:No such file or directory
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/da/ddc/constdefs_8h__dep__incl.md5:No such file or directory
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/da/ddc/constdefs_8h__dep__incl.png:No such file or directory
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/dc/d9d/socket_2conftest_8c.html:No such file or directory
> pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/lang/ruby24/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/ruby24/capi/html/dc/d9d/socket_2conftest_8c_source.html:No such file or directory
> *** Error code 1

Regards,
 Kalten
